message:
fix(net/dns): sort MX records by RFC-priority order on construction

LookupMx::new previously stored MX records in insertion order, forcing
every caller to sort by preference before iterating.  Sort at
construction time so callers get RFC 5321 priority order (lowest
preference first, ties broken by exchange name) without extra work.

- Sort by preference ascending, then exchange lexicographically
- New test: lookup_mx_new_sorts_by_preference verifying 3-record input
  with preference 20,10,10 is reordered to 10(mx0),10(mx1),20(mx2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
